name: Anthropic API
cancel_steps: Go to console.anthropic.com and sign in.

To stop charges: go to Settings > Billing and remove your payment method or set your usage limit to $0. Anthropic API is pay-as-you-go, not a traditional subscription. Removing your payment method or setting a $0 limit prevents future charges.
To close the account entirely: go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This is permanent and will delete all API keys, usage history, and account data.
known_friction: Retention tactics: None — Anthropic's billing console is straightforward with no retention flow.

free_alternatives.name: Claude (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free conversational Claude access without API, subject to usage limits

free_alternatives.name: OpenAI API (free credits)
free_alternatives.note: Competing API with free trial credits for new accounts

notes: Anthropic API is pay-per-token, not a traditional subscription — there is no recurring charge to cancel. To stop all charges, set your spending limit to $0 or remove your payment method from the billing console. Any prepaid API credits may have expiration dates — check your account balance before closing. Account deletion is permanent and removes all API keys. The API console has no dark patterns or retention friction, consistent with Anthropic's developer-focused approach.

name: Copy.ai
cancel_steps: Go to app.copy.ai and sign in.
Go to Settings > Billing > Cancel Plan.
Follow the confirmation prompts. Access continues through end of billing period. Your generated content and templates are retained.
known_friction: The free tier is extremely limited (2,000 words/month), making it feel inadequate as a fallback and increasing pressure to maintain the paid subscription.; Annual plans are significantly cheaper per month but lock users in for the full year with no prorated refund if canceled early. | Retention tactics: May offer a discounted rate or free month during cancellation.; Shows usage statistics highlighting value received from the service.

free_alternatives.name: Copy.ai (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with 2,000 words/month

free_alternatives.name: ChatGPT (free)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI writing assistance with no word limit

free_alternatives.name: Claude (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI writing with daily usage limits

notes: Copy.ai ($49/month Pro, $249+/month for Teams/Enterprise) is an AI copywriting and content generation tool. The cancellation process itself is online and straightforward. The main friction is the stark difference between paid and free tiers — the free tier's 2,000 word/month limit makes it essentially a demo rather than a usable product. Annual plan subscribers should note there's no prorated refund for early cancellation. Your generated content and saved templates remain accessible after canceling.

name: Cursor Pro
cancel_steps: Go to cursor.sh and sign in.
Go to Account > Billing > Cancel Subscription.
Confirm cancellation. Access continues through end of billing period. Your settings, extensions, and projects are preserved. Reverts to the free tier with limited AI completions.
known_friction: Retention tactics: None — Cursor has a clean developer-focused cancellation flow.

free_alternatives.name: Cursor (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with 2,000 AI completions and 50 slow premium requests per month

free_alternatives.name: VS Code + Codeium (free)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI code completion extension for VS Code

free_alternatives.name: VS Code + GitHub Copilot (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier available for verified students and open-source maintainers

notes: Cursor Pro ($20/month) is an AI-powered code editor built on VS Code with integrated AI coding assistance. It has one of the cleanest cancellation flows among AI tools — no dark patterns, no retention maze. The free tier includes 2,000 completions per month, which is enough for light use. Your editor settings, extensions, and configuration are preserved after canceling. Cursor has grown rapidly in the AI coding tool space, competing with GitHub Copilot and other AI assistants.

name: GitHub Copilot
cancel_steps: Go to github.com and sign in.
Click your profile icon > Settings > Billing and plans > Plans and usage.
In the 'GitHub Copilot' section, click 'Manage subscription' > 'Cancel subscription'. Or downgrade to the free tier if you qualify (students, open source maintainers may have free access).
Access continues through end of billing period.
known_friction: Multiple GitHub community forum posts describe users who believed they canceled but continued to be charged for up to a year. The cancellation was processed via 'Downgrade to free' rather than an explicit cancel button, causing confusion. GitHub declined refunds in some cases. | Retention tactics: None significant.

free_alternatives.name: GitHub Copilot (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with limited completions available for all users

free_alternatives.name: Codeium (free)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI code completion

notes: GitHub Copilot Individual is $10/month. A free tier with limited completions was introduced in 2024. If you're only lightly using Copilot, check if the free tier meets your needs before canceling entirely. For teams/enterprise, cancellation goes through the organization billing settings.

name: Jasper AI
cancel_steps: Go to app.jasper.ai and sign in.
Click your profile icon, then go to Settings > Billing.
Click 'Cancel Subscription' or 'Cancel Plan' and follow the prompts. You'll be asked to select a reason for canceling and may be shown a retention offer.

Confirm cancellation. Access continues through the end of your billing period. Your generated content and templates remain accessible until the subscription expires. Export important content before it lapses.
known_friction: Cancellation requires navigating through a multi-step flow with a cancellation reason survey, feature highlights, and a retention offer before reaching the final cancel button. | Retention tactics: Offers a discounted rate (often 20-50% off) during the cancellation flow.; Shows usage statistics and content generated to emphasize the value you'd lose.; May offer a plan downgrade instead of full cancellation.

free_alternatives.name: ChatGPT (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI writing with GPT-4o

free_alternatives.name: Claude (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI writing and analysis assistant

free_alternatives.name: Copy.ai (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with limited AI copywriting features

notes: Jasper AI ($39/month Creator plan, $99/month Pro plan, custom Enterprise pricing) is an AI content platform focused on marketing and business copy. The tool has repositioned from a general AI writer to an enterprise marketing AI platform with brand voice, campaign management, and team collaboration features. Cancellation is available online but involves a multi-step retention flow. Annual plans are non-refundable for remaining months after cancellation. The AI writing space has become heavily commoditized since 2023, making free alternatives like ChatGPT and Claude viable replacements for most individual users.

name: Midjourney
cancel_steps: Go to midjourney.com/account and sign in. You can also access billing via the /subscribe command in the Midjourney Discord server.
Click 'Manage Sub' or 'Cancel Plan' on your account page. This redirects to Stripe's billing portal for Midjourney.
Click 'Cancel Plan' and confirm. Access continues through the end of your billing period. All images you've generated remain accessible in your gallery.
known_friction: Retention tactics: Shows a brief summary of your usage (images generated) before confirming cancellation.; Offers a plan downgrade (e.g., from Pro to Basic) as an alternative to full cancellation.

free_alternatives.name: Adobe Firefly
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with limited AI image generation, commercially safe training data

free_alternatives.name: DALL-E (via ChatGPT free)
free_alternatives.note: Limited free image generation through ChatGPT's free tier

free_alternatives.name: Stable Diffusion (open source)
free_alternatives.note: Free, open-source AI image generation that runs locally — requires GPU hardware

free_alternatives.name: Leonardo AI
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with 150 daily tokens for AI image generation

notes: Midjourney ($10/month Basic, $30/month Standard, $60/month Pro, $120/month Mega) is the leading AI image generation platform known for its artistic quality. Cancellation is one of the cleanest in the AI tools category — a simple two-click process through Stripe's billing portal. Generated images are retained indefinitely in your gallery after cancellation. Midjourney originally operated exclusively through Discord but has expanded to a web interface at midjourney.com. The /subscribe Discord command remains a valid alternative path to billing management. No refunds are provided for unused generation time within a billing period.

name: Perplexity Pro
cancel_steps: Go to perplexity.ai and sign in to your account. If you subscribed via Apple App Store or Google Play, you must cancel through those platforms instead.
Click your profile icon in the bottom-left corner, then select 'Settings'.
Click on 'Subscription' and then 'Manage Subscription' or 'Cancel Plan'.
Confirm cancellation. Access continues through the end of your billing period. You revert to the free tier, which still offers basic AI search with limited Pro model queries per day.
known_friction: Retention tactics: Shows a summary of Pro features you will lose (unlimited Pro searches, file uploads, model selection).; No aggressive retention. Perplexity is generally regarded as having a clean cancellation flow.

free_alternatives.name: Perplexity (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free AI search with limited Pro model queries (about 5/day)

free_alternatives.name: Google Search
free_alternatives.note: Traditional search engine, now with AI overviews

free_alternatives.name: Kagi (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Ad-free search engine with limited free searches

notes: Perplexity Pro costs $20/month or $200/year and adds unlimited Pro searches (using advanced AI models like GPT-4, Claude, etc.), file analysis, image generation, and API credits. The free tier remains genuinely useful with a handful of Pro-level queries per day and unlimited basic searches. Cancellation is straightforward with no aggressive retention tactics, earning a friction score of 1. Perplexity has grown rapidly in the AI search space and raised significant funding in 2024-2025. The main consideration when canceling is whether the free tier's limited Pro queries are sufficient for your usage patterns.

name: Replit Pro
cancel_steps: Go to replit.com and sign in to your account.
Click your username or avatar in the left sidebar, then select 'Account'.
Go to the 'Plans & billing' or 'Billing' section.

Click 'Cancel subscription' or 'Downgrade to Free' and confirm. Your existing projects (Repls) remain accessible on the free tier. Private Repls may become read-only or public depending on current free tier policies.
Access continues through the end of your billing period. Free tier projects remain accessible but with reduced compute resources and storage limits.
known_friction: During cancellation, Replit shows a detailed list of Pro features you will lose, including private Repls, AI coding assistance credits, and compute power, framing the downgrade as a significant loss. | Retention tactics: Shows a feature comparison highlighting what you lose on the free tier.; May offer a discounted rate or additional AI credits to retain you.

free_alternatives.name: Replit (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free browser-based coding with public projects and limited compute

free_alternatives.name: GitHub Codespaces (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: 60 free core-hours/month of cloud development environments

free_alternatives.name: VS Code (free)
free_alternatives.note: Free local code editor with extensive extension ecosystem

notes: Replit has restructured its pricing multiple times. The current Pro plan (approximately $20-25/month) includes private Repls, enhanced AI coding features (Ghostwriter/Agent), more compute power, and additional storage. Replit has pivoted heavily toward AI-assisted development, making AI credits a central part of the Pro value proposition. Cancellation is online and relatively straightforward, though the feature-loss summary during the cancel flow creates some friction. The free tier remains useful for learning and public projects but has significant compute and storage limitations. Replit's pricing and feature tiers have changed frequently, so the exact offerings at cancellation time may differ from what was advertised at sign-up.

name: Carvana
cancel_steps: Carvana is primarily a used car marketplace — not a recurring subscription. Most users are looking to return a recently purchased vehicle.

Vehicle return: Carvana offers a 7-day return policy. Go to carvana.com > My Account > Manage Your Vehicle > Return Vehicle. The 7-day window starts from delivery day. The vehicle must be in the same condition with under 400 additional miles.
For Carvana Care (vehicle protection plan): call 1-800-333-4554 or manage at carvana.com/account. Carvana Care is the recurring subscription component — vehicle protection / extended warranty.
For financing: contact your lender directly. Carvana financing is through Bridgecrest (DriveTime's lending arm). Bridgecrest: 1-888-803-9757 or bridgecrest.com.
known_friction: The 7-day return window is strict and starts from delivery, not from when you sign paperwork. Some customers report difficulty scheduling a return pickup within the window. | Retention tactics: Carvana Care reps may offer a discounted protection plan rate when you attempt to cancel.
notes: Carvana is not a traditional subscription service. If you're looking to: (1) return a vehicle — use the 7-day return policy, which is genuine but strict on timing and condition; (2) cancel Carvana Care (extended warranty) — call 1-800-333-4554; (3) deal with financing — contact Bridgecrest directly. Carvana emerged from near-bankruptcy in 2023-2024 through aggressive cost-cutting and is operational as of 2026. The 7-day return window is a real consumer protection, but schedule the return pickup early — don't wait until day 7.

name: Connected Car Subscriptions (GM / OnStar)
cancel_steps: Press the blue OnStar button in your GM vehicle and request cancellation, OR call 1-888-4ONSTAR (1-888-466-7827). See also the dedicated OnStar entry at cancelfreely.com/cancel/onstar for the full OnStar-specific guide.
For other GM connected services (WiFi hotspot, Remote Access, Super Cruise): go to account.gm.com > Subscriptions > manage individual services.
State which service(s) you want to cancel. Agents will make retention offers.
known_friction: GM vehicles may have several separate connected service subscriptions: OnStar safety/security, WiFi hotspot (AT&T), Remote Access (app features), and Super Cruise (driver assist). Each may bill separately and cancel separately. Users often don't know how many they have. | Retention tactics: Offers discounted rates for individual services.; Offers to keep one service while canceling others.
notes: GM connected services cover OnStar, WiFi hotspot, Remote Access, and Super Cruise across Chevrolet, GMC, Buick, and Cadillac brands. Some services are free trials that auto-convert — check account.gm.com to see all active subscriptions. The OnStar entry in our database covers the primary safety/security subscription in more detail.

name: Endurance Warranty
cancel_steps: Call Endurance: 1-866-432-4443.

To cancel, you must mail a written cancellation request along with a Federal Odometer Statement or notarized mileage statement to the administrator listed in your contract. The mileage documentation requirement is unusual and adds significant friction compared to standard subscription cancellations.
Within 30 days of purchase: full refund. After 30 days: prorated refund minus a cancellation fee (typically $75-$150). 30-day free look period is standard in the vehicle warranty industry.
known_friction: Endurance requires a Federal Odometer Statement or notarized mileage statement to process cancellations — a bureaucratic hurdle not found in standard subscription services. This requirement slows the cancellation process significantly.; Endurance has a 30-day/1,000-mile waiting period before coverage activates. Customers who cancel before coverage begins may not realize they were never actually covered. | Retention tactics: May offer a modified plan or payment restructuring.

free_alternatives.name: Your manufacturer warranty
free_alternatives.note: Check remaining factory warranty before purchasing extended coverage

notes: Endurance is a third-party vehicle service contract provider. The prorated refund is standard. Avoid all third-party warranty companies that contact you via robocall or unsolicited mail — these are frequently scams. Endurance is a legitimate company but cancellation requires more documentation than typical subscriptions.

name: Toyota Connected Services
cancel_steps: Go to toyota.com/connected-services and sign in to your Toyota account.

Navigate to Manage Services / Subscriptions and select the service to cancel. Toyota connected services include Remote Connect, Safety Connect, Wi-Fi Connect, Drive Connect (navigation), and Destination Assist.
Alternatively, call Toyota Connected Services support: 1-800-331-4331. Phone may be required for some service types.
known_friction: New Toyota vehicles include free trials of connected services (typically 1-3 years). When trials expire, services auto-convert to paid subscriptions. Many owners are surprised by the charge and don't realize they signed up.; Toyota's connected services are sold as separate subscriptions (Remote Connect, Safety Connect, etc.), each billing and canceling independently. Owners may not know how many active subscriptions they have. | Retention tactics: May offer a discounted renewal rate.
notes: Toyota connected services vary by model year and trim. Check toyota.com/connected-services to see which services are available for your specific vehicle. Free trial periods vary — Remote Connect may be 3 years free on newer models. After the trial, each service bills separately.

name: Backblaze
cancel_steps: Go to backblaze.com and sign in.

Go to 'My Account' > 'Overview' > find your backup license and click 'Remove'. For Computer Backup: remove all registered backups and licenses. For B2 Cloud Storage: the account can be canceled separately.
To fully delete your account: go to 'My Account' > 'Account Details' > 'Close Account'.
known_friction: Backblaze explicitly states no refunds on monthly subscriptions. Cancel at the end of your billing period to avoid paying for unused time. | Retention tactics: None significant.

free_alternatives.name: Backblaze (free trial)
free_alternatives.note: Free 30-day trial for Computer Backup

free_alternatives.name: Google Drive (free 15GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 15GB

notes: Backblaze is straightforward to cancel. No refunds on monthly plans — time your cancellation to the end of your billing period. Annual/2-year plans get a 30-day refund window. Before canceling, download your backed-up data if needed — you can request a hard drive restore for a fee.

name: Carbonite
cancel_steps: Go to carbonite.com and sign in to your account.
Go to 'Account Summary' and find the auto-renewal setting. Turn off automatic renewal. Your subscription remains active through the paid period, then expires.
⚠️ CRITICAL: After your subscription expires, Carbonite permanently deletes your backed-up files after a grace period of 30–60 days. Download any important backed-up files before canceling.
known_friction: Backed-up files are permanently deleted 30–60 days after subscription expiry. This is not prominently warned during the cancellation flow. | Retention tactics: May offer a discounted renewal rate.

free_alternatives.name: Backblaze
free_alternatives.note: Competing backup service, similar pricing

free_alternatives.name: Google Drive (free 15GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 15GB cloud storage

notes: Carbonite is an online backup service (files, not apps). The data deletion window is the critical thing — don't cancel without first downloading your backed-up files or ensuring you have local copies. Carbonite is owned by OpenText as of 2019.

name: Google One
cancel_steps: Go to one.google.com and sign in.
Click 'Manage' next to your storage plan, then select 'Cancel plan'.
On Android: Open Google One app > Settings > Manage Google One > Cancel membership. If subscribed via iOS App Store, cancel through Apple's subscription management.

Confirm cancellation. Access reverts to the free 15GB tier. Files above that limit become inaccessible to upload/edit — but existing files are not deleted for a grace period. Prorated refund is available if requested promptly.
known_friction: If you're over the 15GB free limit, canceling means you can't upload new files, receive new emails (if Gmail is full), or sync new photos. Google doesn't delete your files but makes them effectively frozen.; Google One storage is shared across Gmail, Drive, and Photos. Users often don't realize that canceling Google One affects all three services, not just Drive. | Retention tactics: Shows current storage usage and how much exceeds the free tier.; Offers a downgrade to a lower (cheaper) storage

free_alternatives.name: Google (free 15GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 15GB shared across Gmail, Drive, and Photos

free_alternatives.name: iCloud (free 5GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 5GB for Apple users

notes: Google One ($1.99/month for 100GB, $2.99/month for 200GB, $9.99/month for 2TB) is the paid storage upgrade for Gmail, Drive, and Photos. Canceling reverts to the free 15GB shared across all three services. If you're over 15GB, clean up before canceling — Google won't delete your files immediately but will prevent new uploads and email receipt. Google One also includes additional benefits like VPN (on 2TB+ plans), Google Photos editing features, and family storage sharing. The prorated refund option for annual plans is available but must be requested.

name: iCloud+
cancel_steps: On iPhone/iPad: Go to Settings > [your name] > iCloud > Manage Account Storage > Change Storage Plan > Downgrade Options > select Free.
On Mac: System Settings > [your name] > iCloud > Manage > Change Storage Plan > Downgrade Options.
Without an Apple device: Go to appleid.apple.com, sign in, then manage subscriptions.

⚠️ Downgrading takes effect at the end of the billing period. Files above the free 5GB limit won't be deleted immediately, but new uploads and iCloud backups will stop working until you're under the limit.
known_friction: Apple's cancellation flow doesn't prominently surface what happens to data above 5GB after downgrade. Users who don't clean up first may lose access to backups and find devices can't back up. | Retention tactics: None — Apple's flow is clean.

free_alternatives.name: iCloud (free 5GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 5GB with Apple ID

free_alternatives.name: Google Photos (free 15GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 15GB for photos/videos

notes: iCloud+ plans start at $0.99/month for 50GB. Before downgrading, clean out iCloud Drive, delete old device backups, and optimize photo storage. Family Sharing members share the same storage plan — downgrading affects everyone.

name: OneDrive (Microsoft 365)
cancel_steps: Go to account.microsoft.com and sign in with your Microsoft account. OneDrive storage is bundled with Microsoft 365. Canceling Microsoft 365 also cancels the extra OneDrive storage.
Go to 'Services & subscriptions', find your Microsoft 365 plan, click 'Manage', then click 'Cancel subscription'.
Walk through the cancellation flow — Microsoft will show retention offers and ask for a reason. You may be offered a discounted renewal or a switch to a different plan.

Confirm cancellation. Download any files above the 5GB free limit before the grace period ends. After cancellation, OneDrive reverts to the free 5GB tier. Files above that limit become read-only and are eventually deleted after a grace period (typically 90 days, though Microsoft may change this).
known_friction: OneDrive storage is bundled with Microsoft 365, so canceling cloud storage also means losing access to Office apps (Word, Excel, PowerPoint). This makes it harder to leave just the storage component.; Microsoft warns during cancellation that files exceeding the free tier limit will become inaccessible, creating urgency and anxiety about data loss. | Retention tactics: Offers a discounted renewal rate during the cancellation flow.; Shows a summary of all Microsoft 365 features you will lose (Offi

free_alternatives.name: OneDrive (free 5GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 5GB with any Microsoft account

free_alternatives.name: Google Drive (free 15GB)
free_alternatives.note: Free 15GB shared across Gmail, Drive, and Photos

free_alternatives.name: Proton Drive (free 1GB)
free_alternatives.note: End-to-end encrypted free cloud storage

notes: Microsoft 365 Personal costs $6.99/month or $69.99/year, and includes 1TB OneDrive storage along with Office apps. Standalone OneDrive storage plans were discontinued by Microsoft in 2026, so all OneDrive storage above 5GB now requires a Microsoft 365 subscription. The bundling of storage with Office apps creates a lock-in effect — users who only want cloud storage must pay for the full suite. After cancellation, there is a grace period to download files above the 5GB free limit, but Microsoft can change this window. The cancellation flow includes retention offers but is otherwise straightforward.

name: Bumble
cancel_steps: ⚠️ Deleting the Bumble app does NOT cancel your subscription.
iOS: Open Settings > [your name] > Subscriptions > Bumble > Cancel Subscription.
Android: Open Google Play > Profile > Payments & Subscriptions > Subscriptions > Bumble > Cancel.
Web: Go to bumble.com > Profile photo > Manage your Boost or Manage your Premium > Cancel. Web cancellation is available for direct/web subscriptions.
known_friction: Like most dating apps, deleting Bumble does not cancel the subscription. Must cancel through the originating platform. | Retention tactics: None significant beyond standard confirmation.

free_alternatives.name: Bumble (free tier)
free_alternatives.note: Free tier with limited swipes and features

notes: Bumble's cancellation is cleaner than most dating apps — web cancellation works for web subscribers. Covers Bumble Boost, Premium, and Premium+ tiers. Cancel method depends entirely on where you originally subscribed.

name: eHarmony
cancel_steps: Go to eharmony.com and sign in.
Click your profile icon > Account Settings > Billing.
Find 'Cancel Subscription' or 'Turn Off Automatic Renewal'. eHarmony frames cancellation as 'turning off auto-renewal' rather than canceling. Your subscription continues until the current term ends.
You will be required to enter your password and navigate multiple confirmation screens before cancellation is processed. Multiple screens with retention messaging before the final confirmation.
If subscribed via Apple or Google, cancel through those platforms.
known_friction: eHarmony presents cancellation as 'turning off automatic renewal' rather than 'canceling your subscription' — obscuring the action and creating uncertainty about whether the account has been truly canceled.; eHarmony's cancellation flow includes password re-entry and multiple confirmation screens with retention messaging before reaching final cancel.; eHarmony charges $35.90-$65.90/month and auto-renews at full price after introductory offers expire. Many users report surprise charges. | Retenti

name: Hinge

iOS: Open Settings > [your name] > Subscriptions > Hinge > Cancel Subscription.
Android: Open Google Play > Profile > Payments & Subscriptions > Subscriptions > Hinge > Cancel.
Access continues through end of billing period.
known_friction: Deleting the Hinge account or app does not cancel the paid subscription. Users must cancel through Apple or Google separately — a common trap. | Retention tactics: None — Apple/Google handle the flow.

name: Match.com
cancel_steps: Go to match.com and sign in. If subscribed via Apple or Google, cancel through those platforms instead.
Click your profile photo > Settings > Subscription.
Find 'Cancel Subscription' or 'Manage Subscription' and follow the prompts. Match requires navigating through several menus — the cancel option is not prominently displayed.
⚠️ Canceling stops auto-renewal but your subscription remains active until the end of the paid term. Match does not issue refunds for unused time.
known_friction: Match.com does not refund unused subscription time after cancellation. Canceling stops future charges but does not recover the current period.; Match's cancel flow turns off auto-renewal but doesn't make clear that the subscription itself continues until the paid period ends. Users sometimes believe they've gotten a refund when they haven't. | Retention tactics: May offer a discounted renewal.

Android: Open Google Play > Profile > Payments & Subscriptions > Subscriptions > Tinder > Cancel.

name: GoDaddy
cancel_steps: Go to godaddy.com and sign in.
Go to your account > Renewals & Billing > find the product > turn off Auto-Renew. GoDaddy has many separate product lines — domains, hosting, email, website builder. Each cancels separately.
For refunds within 30 days: contact GoDaddy support at 1-480-505-8877 or via chat.
known_friction: GoDaddy is notorious for aggressive upselling during domain purchase — privacy protection, SSL, hosting, email, website builder, all pre-checked or prominently pushed. Many users end up with services they didn't intend to buy.; GoDaddy bills each service separately with different renewal dates, making it easy to lose track of what you're paying for. Turning off auto-renew on a domain doesn't affect hosting, and vice versa. | Retention tactics: May offer a discount to keep services.

free_alternatives.name: Cloudflare Registrar
free_alternatives.note: At-cost domain registration, no markup

free_alternatives.name: Namecheap
free_alternatives.note: Competitive domain pricing

notes: GoDaddy sells dozens of separate products. Audit your account for everything you're paying for — domains, hosting, email, SSL, website builder, Microsoft 365, etc. Each has its own auto-renew setting. Turn off auto-renew on domains you don't want rather than waiting for the renewal date.

name: Namecheap Auto-Renewal
cancel_steps: Go to namecheap.com and sign in to your account.
For domains: Go to Domain List > find the domain > click 'Manage' > toggle 'Auto-Renew' off. The domain remains active until its expiration date and simply won't be renewed.
For hosting products: Go to Hosting List > find the hosting plan > click 'Manage' > Cancel or turn off auto-renewal. Back up your website files and databases before canceling hosting.

The return window is typically 14 days from delivery. Cancel timing is important -- you need to cancel before the next box ships to avoid the styling fee. ThredUp is a publicly traded company (TDUP) focused on the secondhand fashion market, and the Goody Box is one of several subscription-style offerings they have tested.

name: Acorns
cancel_steps: Open the Acorns app or go to app.acorns.com and sign in. Account closure must be done through the app or website — you cannot call to cancel.
Tap your profile icon > Settings > Personal > Subscription > Close Account.
Follow the prompts to withdraw your balance and confirm account closure. Your invested balance will be liquidated (sold) and returned to your linked bank account. This may take 3-6 business days.
Confirm the tax implications of liquidating your investments. Selling investments may trigger capital gains taxes if your positions have appreciated. Consider timing your closure accordingly.
known_friction: To close your Acorns account, all investments must be sold — you cannot transfer holdings to another brokerage. This creates a taxable event and a psychological barrier to leaving.; The cancellation flow shows your investment progress, projected growth, and how much you'll 'lose' by leaving, creating emotional friction before allowing closure.; Unlike traditional brokerages that support ACAT transfers, Acorns does not allow transferring your portfolio to another broker — you must sell everything

free_alternatives.note: Free stock/ETF investing with no subscription fees

free_alternatives.note: Free investing with no account minimums and fractional shares

free_alternatives.note: Free stock/ETF investing with no commissions

notes: Acorns ($3-$12/month depending on tier: Bronze, Silver, Gold) is a micro-investing app that rounds up purchases and invests spare change. The main cancellation friction is the forced liquidation requirement — unlike traditional brokerages, you cannot transfer your portfolio to another broker via ACAT. All positions must be sold, which may trigger capital gains taxes. The monthly subscription fee relative to small balances is a common complaint: on a $500 balance, the $3/month fee represents a 7.2% annual drag. No early termination fee, but the tax implications of forced selling create real financial friction.

name: Credit Karma

Follow the prompts to confirm account deletion. Credit Karma will delete your account and personal data. Note: if you have a Credit Karma Money account (savings or spending), that must be closed separately first.
known_friction: The account deletion option is not prominently surfaced. Reddit users describe it as 'a bit tricky' to find. Credit Karma (owned by Intuit) monetizes through financial product referrals — account closure is not incentivized. | Retention tactics: None — no paid subscription.
notes: Credit Karma has no paid subscription — it's free and makes money through financial product referrals (credit cards, loans). If you want to stop using it, delete the account to remove your data. Close any Credit Karma Money accounts first before account deletion.

name: Mint (Intuit)
cancel_steps: Mint shut down permanently on January 1, 2024. The service no longer exists. Intuit migrated Mint users to Credit Karma. There is nothing to cancel.

If you have a Credit Karma account created via the Mint migration and want to close it: go to creditkarma.com > Settings > Account > Close Account. Closing Credit Karma does not affect your credit score or reports.

If you're still seeing charges labeled 'Mint' or 'Intuit', these may be for other Intuit products (TurboTax, QuickBooks, Mailchimp). Check your Intuit account at accounts.intuit.com. Contact Intuit support at 1-800-446-8848 if unexplained charges persist.

free_alternatives.name: Credit Karma
free_alternatives.note: Intuit's replacement for Mint — free budgeting, credit monitoring, and financial overview

The shutdown was controversial as Mint was the most popular free personal finance app with over 3.6 million active users. If you're still seeing Intuit charges on your statement, they are likely related to other Intuit products (TurboTax, QuickBooks, Mailchimp) rather than Mint. The Mint shutdown catalyzed a wave of alternatives including Monarch Money, Copilot, and enhanced budgeting features in Credit Karma.

name: Noom
cancel_steps: In the Noom app: tap your profile > Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription.
Online: go to noom.com > sign in > account settings > Subscription Portal > Cancel.

Navigate through multiple retention screens — Noom will offer free trial extensions, deep discounts, and pause options before allowing cancellation. Stay firm. Multiple Reddit users report needing to decline 3-5 offers before reaching the final cancel button.
Get a cancellation confirmation email — save it. Noom has been reported to continue charging after cancellation without confirmation.
known_friction: Multiple Reddit users report Noom continued renewing charges after what they believed was a successful cancellation, with no renewal notification emails. One user described discovering months of charges they never received receipts for.; Noom's cancellation flow includes multiple retention screens with escalating offers (free trials, deep discounts, pauses) that must each be declined before reaching the final cancel button.; Reddit users describe Noom as 'impossible to cancel,' with phone agents

name: QuickBooks

Click the gear icon (Settings) > Account and Settings > Billing & Subscription.
Click 'Cancel subscription' and follow the prompts. For QuickBooks Self-Employed: same path, or go directly to quickbooks.intuit.com/self-employed.
Export your data before canceling: Reports > export to Excel/CSV. Access ends at end of billing period. ⚠️ After cancellation, you lose access to your QuickBooks data. Export everything first.

name: Robinhood
cancel_steps: Before closing: sell or transfer all stocks, ETFs, and crypto. Withdraw all cash to your bank account. IRA accounts require a rollover to another institution. You cannot close a Robinhood account with a balance. All positions must be liquidated or transferred first.
In the app: tap your profile icon > Account > Investing > Account Information > Deactivate Account.
On web: go to account.robinhood.com > Settings > Investing > Deactivate Account.

Send a written confirmation to support@robinhood.com stating your intent to close the account. The written email step is required per Robinhood's process. A representative will follow up within 5 business days.
known_friction: Robinhood requires all positions to be liquidated or transferred before account closure — you cannot simply close and have them handle it. For investors with diversified portfolios, this can take significant time and may trigger taxable events. | Retention tactics: None — account closure is straightforward once balances are zero.

name: TurboTax
cancel_steps: TurboTax is primarily pay-per-filing, not a recurring subscription. Most users pay once per tax year when they file. If you have TurboTax Advantage (auto-delivery of desktop software) or TurboTax Live, that is a recurring subscription.
To cancel TurboTax Advantage: sign in at myturbotax.intuit.com > select 'My Account' > 'Manage TurboTax Advantage' > Cancel.

To remove TurboTax Live/Expert Assist from your current return (before paying): go to your return > Review Your Order > Downgrade. If you've already used the Expert feature, you cannot remove it from that return.
known_friction: TurboTax aggressively upsells to higher tiers and Expert Assist during the filing process. The downgrade path is intentionally less visible than the upgrade path. | Retention tactics: May offer a discount on TurboTax Advantage renewal.

name: YNAB (You Need A Budget)
cancel_steps: Go to app.youneedabudget.com and sign in. If you subscribed via Apple App Store, cancel through iOS Settings > [your name] > Subscriptions > YNAB instead.
Click your account name in the top-left, then select 'My Account' or 'Account Settings'.
Scroll to the subscription section and click 'Cancel your subscription'.

notes: YNAB costs $14.99/month or $109/year and follows a zero-based envelope budgeting methodology. The price increased significantly from $84/year to $99/year in 2021 and again to $109/year in 2024, generating substantial user backlash each time. YNAB offers a 34-day free trial for new users and provides a free year for students. The most important step before canceling is exporting your budget data, as all data is permanently deleted 30 days after account closure. YNAB does not offer prorated refunds on annual plans. The budgeting methodology itself is well-regarded, and the open-source alternative Actual Budget replicates much of YNAB's approach without the subscription cost.

name: Anytime Fitness
cancel_steps: Contact your home club directly — Anytime Fitness is a franchise, so each location has its own cancellation process. Call or visit your specific club to get their exact cancellation requirements before proceeding.
Visit your home club in person and request cancellation in writing.

known_friction: Each Anytime Fitness franchise sets its own cancellation policies, fees, and notice requirements. Corporate provides guidelines but individual clubs have discretion. known_friction: During the cancellation flow, Peloton highlights upcoming live classes, instructor events, and new content releases to trigger fear of missing out.; The cancellation flow requires navigating through multiple screens — a pause offer, a discount offer, a feature summary, and a survey — before reaching the actual cancel confirmation. | Retention tactics: Offers a membership pause (1-3 months) before allowing cancellation.; Presents a discounted rate (commonly 50% off for 2-3 months) to retain you.;

cancel_steps: Visit your home club in person — the specific location where you originally signed up. You CANNOT cancel at a different Planet Fitness location. If you've moved, you must use the certified mail method instead.
Request a cancellation form at the front desk and fill it out completely. Some locations require a manager to process the cancellation. If no manager is available, you may be asked to return.

Alternatively: send a written cancellation letter via certified mail with return receipt requested to your home club's address. Include your full name, address, phone number, membership ID, and a clear request to cancel. Use certified mail — regular mail may be claimed as 'never received.'

Confirm cancellation by checking your bank statement in the next billing cycle. Planet Fitness bills on the 17th of each month. Canceling after the 17th may result in one additional charge. There is also an annual fee billed around August — cancel before the 25th of the prior month to avoid it. Early termination fee of ~$58 may apply if under contract.
known_friction: Online cancellation is not available despite the FTC's Click-to-Cancel Rule (in legal limbo as of 2026 due to gym industry lobbying). Members must visit their home club or send certified mail.; Cancellation must occur at the specific location where the membership was originally registered — not any Planet Fitness. name: Daily Harvest

notes: Daily Harvest delivers pre-portioned, plant-based smoothies, harvest bowls, flatbreads, and snacks. Pricing varies by plan size ($6-$12 per item depending on quantity). No long-term contract, but the weekly order cutoff window creates practical friction — if you miss it, you're charged. Many users think they've canceled when they've only skipped.; Factor processes charges and prepares meals weekly. name: Freshly

known_friction: The rebrand from Freshly to Freshly Frozen, combined with ownership changes, makes it difficult for users to find the correct cancellation page or even determine if their account is still active. | Retention tactics: May offer a pause or skip option.; Suggests adjusting meal quantity or delivery frequency.

name: Panera Unlimited Sip Club

When canceling by phone, expect agents to offer rate reviews and retention discounts before processing. Always ensure your new policy is active before canceling to avoid a dangerous and potentially illegal coverage gap.

Cox and Charter announced a merger in 2025 that is pending regulatory review.

name: Mint Mobile
cancel_steps: The cleanest way to cancel is to port your number to a new carrier. Initiate the port at the new carrier. You'll need your Mint Mobile account number (found in Account Settings) and transfer PIN.
To cancel without porting: log in at mintmobile.com > Account > Cancel Service. You will lose your phone number if you cancel without porting.
Alternatively, call Mint Mobile support at 1-800-683-7392 (or dial 611 from your Mint phone). Phone support can process cancellations and may be faster for complex situations.
7-day money-back guarantee: if within 7 days of activation and under 50MB of data used, contact support for a full refund. This applies to new activations only, not renewals.
known_friction: Plans are sold in 3, 6, or 12-month prepaid blocks with no pro-rated refunds for unused months, creating a financial disincentive to cancel mid-term. | Retention tactics: Phone agents may offer a renewal discount or plan upgrade incentive.; Emphasizes the prepaid balance remaining on your account that would be forfeited.

free_alternatives.name: Google Fi (flexible plan)
free_alternatives.note: Pay-per-use data with $20/month base — only pay for data you use

free_alternatives.name: Tello
free_alternatives.note: Budget carrier with month-to-month plans starting at $5/month, no contracts

free_alternatives.name: US Mobile
free_alternatives.note: Flexible plans on Verizon or T-Mobile networks with no prepaid lock-in

notes: Mint Mobile is a budget MVNO on T-Mobile's network, acquired by T-Mobile in 2023. Plans are sold in prepaid 3-month ($15-$30/month), 6-month, or 12-month ($15-$25/month) blocks — there are no monthly plans, so 'cancellation' means not renewing or porting to another carrier. The prepaid model means no pro-rated refunds for unused months. The 7-day money-back guarantee applies only to new activations with under 50MB data used. When porting out, your Mint service ends automatically — no separate cancellation step is needed. Family plans (Mint Family) follow the same prepaid structure.

name: Spectrum (Charter)
cancel_steps: Call Spectrum: 1-833-267-6094 (retention/disconnect line). Spectrum does not allow online cancellation. Phone or in-person only.
Alternatively, visit a Spectrum store in person — faster than calling.

State clearly you want to cancel. Retention agents will make multiple offers — discounts, speed upgrades, bundle renegotiations. Spectrum has no early termination fee on standard residential plans — a genuine advantage over some competitors.

Return all rented equipment (modem, router, cable box) to a Spectrum store or UPS drop-off. Keep the receipt. IMPORTANT: Spectrum does NOT prorate bills. Canceling mid-billing-cycle means you pay the full month — time your cancellation to the end of your billing period if possible.
known_friction: Spectrum does not offer online self-service cancellation despite fully online signup. Phone or in-person required.; Spectrum does not prorate the final bill. If you cancel mid-cycle, you pay the full billing period with no credit. Customers must time cancellation carefully. | Retention tactics: Offers significant discounts (often 50%+ off) on current plan.; Offers speed upgrades at same price.; Offers service bundling to lower per-service cost.

free_alternatives.name: T-Mobile Home Internet
free_alternatives.note: 5G home internet, often $50/month with no contract

free_alternatives.name: AT&T Fiber
free_alternatives.note: Where available, often competitive pricing with no ETF

notes: Spectrum/Charter lost significant internet subscribers in 2025 (over 500,000) as fiber and 5G alternatives expanded. No ETF is genuinely helpful. The no-proration policy is the main financial gotcha — calculate your billing cycle end date before calling. Comcast and Spectrum together lost over 1 million internet customers in 2025.

name: T-Mobile
cancel_steps: Fastest method: Port your number to the new carrier. Number porting automatically cancels T-Mobile service. If you're switching carriers, initiate the port at the new carrier — you do not need to call T-Mobile first.
To cancel without porting: Call T-Mobile at 1-877-453-1304 or visit a T-Mobile store.
Say clearly you want to cancel. T-Mobile's support page explicitly says 'we'd like to prevent your cancellation' — retention offers will follow.
Check for remaining device installment balance — it must be paid even after service cancellation.
known_friction: T-Mobile's own support page for cancellation leads with 'We'd like to prevent your cancellation' and offers retention alternatives before providing cancellation instructions.; Outstanding device installment balances survive service cancellation and remain due in full. | Retention tactics: Offers discounted plan alternatives.; Offers account pause (up to 3 months).; Offers switching credits if reason is competitor pricing.

free_alternatives.name: Mint Mobile

free_alternatives.name: Metro by T-Mobile
free_alternatives.note: Budget prepaid on T-Mobile network

notes: T-Mobile has generally better cancellation friction than AT&T or Comcast — phone cancellation works and the process is faster. The number port trick is the cleanest path if switching carriers. T-Mobile's churn ticked up in Q3 2025 — they are aggressively competing on retention offers.

name: Verizon
cancel_steps: Call Verizon: 1-800-922-0204. Say 'cancel service'. For Fios (internet/TV), call 1-800-837-4966.
Alternatively, visit a Verizon store in person — generally faster than phone.

Check your device payment plan status before calling. Any remaining device installment balance is due regardless of service cancellation. Number porting to a new carrier automatically cancels service. Port your number first if switching — this is the fastest cancellation path.
Return Fios equipment (routers, set-top boxes) to avoid equipment fees.
known_friction: Like AT&T, Verizon separates device installments from service billing. Customers who cancel before paying off a device still owe the full remaining balance, often hundreds of dollars.; Phone cancellations are routed through retention teams who make multiple offers before processing. | Retention tactics: Offers loyalty discounts and bill credits.; Matches competitor pricing.; Offers an account pause instead of canceling.

name: Bluegreen Vacations
cancel_method: certified mail or official exit program
cancel_steps: CRITICAL: Check your contract for the rescission period — typically 3 to 10 days depending on your state. This is the only penalty-free exit.
Within the rescission period: Write a cancellation letter with your name, contract number, purchase date, and a clear statement that you are rescinding. All signers must sign.
Send via USPS Certified Mail with Return Receipt to the address in your contract. Keep the tracking receipt.

After the rescission period: Contact Bluegreen Customer Care to request written information on their exit options: 1-800-456-2582. Bluegreen offers deed-back and voluntary surrender programs for qualifying owners (account must be current).
⚠️ Bluegreen has been the target of many predatory third-party exit scams. Never pay upfront fees to any exit company.
known_friction: Multi-hour high-pressure sales presentations with urgency and misleading investment claims.; Bluegreen uses a points-based system that obscures the actual value of what was purchased. Points have complex expiration and booking rules that make the product harder to understand and exit.; Annual maintenance fees ($800-$2,000+) increase each year with no cap. | Retention tactics: May offer hardship deferment, point conversions, or alternative plans before processing deed-back.
notes: Bluegreen Vacations is owned by Hilton Grand Vacations (acquired 2024). The Bluegreen brand continues to operate separately for now. After the rescission window, official exit options include deed-back (if eligible) or a licensed timeshare exit attorney. The resale market for Bluegreen points is extremely limited — many owners find they cannot sell even for $1.

name: Hilton Grand Vacations
cancel_method: certified mail or official exit program
cancel_steps: CRITICAL: Check your purchase contract for the rescission period — typically 3 to 10 days depending on your state. Act immediately if within this window.

Within the rescission period: Write a formal rescission letter stating: your full name, contract number, purchase date, and the exact sentence 'I am writing to inform you of my decision to rescind my timeshare contract with Hilton Grand Vacations.' All signers on the contract must sign the letter.

Send via USPS Certified Mail with Return Receipt to the cancellation address in your contract. Keep all tracking documentation permanently. Postmark must be before the rescission deadline — not delivery date.

After the rescission period: Contact Hilton Grand Vacations owner services to ask about their official exit/deed-back program: 1-800-230-7068. Hilton has an official exit program for qualifying owners. Eligibility typically requires the account to be current on all payments.
⚠️ Do not pay any upfront fees to a third-party exit company. The FTC and state AGs have taken action against many of these.
known_friction: Multi-hour presentations with urgency tactics and misleading claims about rental income, investment value, or flexibility.; Annual maintenance fees ($1,000-$3,500+) escalate indefinitely. The only way to stop them is to exit the contract through the official program. | Retention tactics: Owner services may offer hardship deferment, club currency conversions, or alternative programs before processing an exit.
notes: Hilton Grand Vacations (HGV) acquired Diamond Resorts in 2021, significantly expanding their portfolio. If you own through Diamond, the exit process is now managed by HGV. The rescission window is the critical action item — everything else requires going through HGV's official program or a licensed attorney.

name: Holiday Inn Club Vacations

Send via USPS Certified Mail with Return Receipt to the address specified in your contract. Postmark controls the deadline. Keep the tracking receipt and signed return receipt card as permanent proof.

If you purchased at an Orange Lake resort under the Holiday Inn brand, the exit process goes through Holiday Inn Club Vacations owner services. name: Marriott Vacations Worldwide
cancel_method: certified mail or official exit program
cancel_steps: CRITICAL: Check your contract for the rescission period — typically 3 to 10 days depending on the state where you purchased. This is your only penalty-free exit window.
Within the rescission period: Write a rescission letter with your name, contract number, purchase date, and a clear statement that you are rescinding the contract. All signers must sign.

Send via USPS Certified Mail with Return Receipt to the address in your contract. Postmark date controls the deadline. Keep the certified mail receipt and return receipt card. These are your proof of timely cancellation.

After the rescission period: Contact Marriott Vacations' official exit program. Call Marriott Vacation Club owner services: 1-800-860-9384. Marriott offers a voluntary surrender/deed-back program for qualifying owners. Eligibility requirements apply.

Marriott Vacations Worldwide also owns Sheraton Vacation Club, Westin Vacation Club, and Vistana Signature Experiences — exit processes are similar.

name: Wyndham Vacation Ownership
cancel_steps: CRITICAL: Check your contract immediately for the rescission (cancellation) period — typically 3 to 10 days depending on your state. This is the only penalty-free exit window. The rescission period begins the day you sign, not when you return home. Act immediately if you are within it.

Within the rescission period: Write a cancellation letter stating your name, contract number, purchase date, and a clear statement that you are exercising your legal right to rescind. All signers must sign the letter.

Send the letter via USPS Certified Mail with Return Receipt to the address specified in your contract. Keep the tracking receipt and the return receipt card permanently. The postmark date determines whether you beat the rescission deadline — not the delivery date.

After the rescission period: Contact Wyndham's official exit program — Wyndham Cares — at wyndhamdestinations.com/us/en/wyndham-cares or call 1-855-965-0398. Wyndham Cares is the official deed-back and exit program. This is not an immediate cancellation — it involves a process and eligibility requirements.
⚠️ AVOID timeshare exit companies that charge upfront fees. The FTC and state AGs have pursued many of these as scams. Only use Wyndham's official program or a licensed attorney.
known_friction: Timeshare sales presentations use multi-hour pressure sessions, fabricated urgency ('today only' pricing), and misleading investment claims. The rescission period exists specifically because of these practices.; Annual maintenance fees (typically $1,000-$3,000+/year for Wyndham) increase indefinitely and cannot be canceled separately from the ownership — you must exit the entire contract to stop them.; Wyndham timeshares have minimal resale value. Third-party 'buyers' offering to purchase your t
notes: Timeshare contracts are real estate contracts, not subscriptions. Canceling outside the rescission window requires using Wyndham's official exit program (Wyndham Cares), attempting resale (limited market), deed-back (if eligible), or consulting a licensed timeshare exit attorney. Stop paying maintenance fees without a formal exit and Wyndham may pursue collections or foreclosure affecting your credit. Do not pay upfront fees to any third-party exit company.

name: Clear
cancel_steps: Go to clearme.com and sign in.
Go to Account > Membership > Cancel Membership.
Follow the confirmation prompts. Or call 1-855-253-2763 to cancel by phone.
Confirm cancellation and check your email for confirmation. Access continues through end of the annual billing period. No prorated refund is available.
known_friction: CLEAR auto-renews annually at $189/year with limited notice. Many users report being charged for a renewal they forgot about or didn't want.; If you cancel after the annual renewal date, there is no prorated refund — you've paid for the full year regardless of when you cancel.; Many consumers confuse CLEAR with TSA PreCheck. CLEAR is biometric identity verification (skips the ID check line), while PreCheck skips the security screening. Users may sign up not understanding what they're actually ge

free_alternatives.name: Global Entry
free_alternatives.note: $100 for 5 years — includes TSA PreCheck + expedited customs

notes: CLEAR ($189/year, discounts available for Delta, United, and other partners) provides biometric identity verification at airports. It complements rather than replaces TSA PreCheck — CLEAR gets you to the front of the ID check line, while PreCheck expedites the actual security screening. The main cancellation friction is the annual billing model with no prorated refunds. Multiple users report forgetting about the annual renewal and being charged unexpectedly. Before signing up, check if your airline or credit card offers a CLEAR discount or membership credit.

name: Global Entry Renewal
cancel_steps: Global Entry is not a recurring subscription — it's a 5-year enrollment ($120). To not renew, simply let it expire.
To cancel an active application: log into the Trusted Traveler Programs portal at ttp.cbp.dhs.gov. Application fees are non-refundable once submitted.
To revoke an active membership: contact CBP through ttp.cbp.dhs.gov. Global Entry includes TSA PreCheck — letting Global Entry lapse means losing both benefits.
known_friction: Retention tactics: None — this is a government program with no commercial retention tactics.

free_alternatives.name: TSA PreCheck (standalone)
free_alternatives.note: $78 for 5 years — domestic-only expedited screening without customs benefits

notes: Global Entry ($120 for 5 years, or $24/year effective) includes TSA PreCheck and expedited customs re-entry for international travelers. It's a government program run by U.S. Customs and Border Protection — no dark patterns, no retention tactics, no auto-renewal. Many premium credit cards (Chase Sapphire Reserve, Amex Platinum, Capital One Venture X, etc.) reimburse the enrollment fee as a cardholder benefit. Renewal requires a new application and may require a new interview. The program has expanded enrollment centers and reduced wait times since 2023.

The Elite tier covers economy deals and the Premium tier adds business/first class deal alerts. name: Hopper Premium
cancel_steps: Hopper subscriptions are managed through the app store where you subscribed. Hopper is a mobile-first app. There is no web-based subscription management.
iOS: Settings > [your name] > Subscriptions > Hopper > Cancel Subscription.
Android: Google Play > Profile > Payments & Subscriptions > Subscriptions > Hopper > Cancel.
Access continues through the end of your billing period. Price Freeze credits and Carrot Cash you've already earned remain in your account.
known_friction: Hopper adds fees for features like Price Freeze, Cancel for Any Reason, and Change for Any Reason as individual add-ons during booking, making the total cost unclear until late in the checkout process.; Premium features are sometimes pre-selected during booking flow, requiring users to actively opt out of paid add-ons. | Retention tactics: Highlights accumulated Carrot Cash balance that would go unused.; Promotes the value of Price Freeze and Cancel for Any Reason features you'd lose.

Cancellation itself is clean since it routes through app store subscription management. The core Hopper app remains free and fully functional for price predictions and bookings without Premium. Hopper's fintech-style insurance products are underwritten by third-party insurers.

The free version of Tripadvisor still provides full access to reviews, forums, and price comparison tools. name: TSA PreCheck Renewal
cancel_steps: TSA PreCheck is not a recurring subscription. It is a 5-year enrollment costing $78 ($70 online renewal). To not renew, simply do nothing when it expires. There is nothing to actively cancel -- your enrollment simply lapses after 5 years.

If you enrolled through an enrollment provider (IDEMIA, Telos, Alclear, etc.) and they enabled auto-renewal, log into that provider's portal to disable auto-renewal. IDEMIA: universalenroll.dhs.gov/myaccount. Check your enrollment confirmation email for your provider.

Renewal notices arrive by email approximately 6 months before expiration. Ignore them if you do not wish to renew. These are legitimate TSA/DHS emails, not spam, but they do not auto-charge you unless you opted into auto-renewal.

If you were auto-charged for a renewal you did not authorize, contact your enrollment provider to dispute and request a refund. TSA itself does not process payments -- enrollment providers handle billing.
known_friction: Retention tactics: Sends multiple renewal reminder emails starting 6 months before expiration to create urgency around re-enrollment.; Some enrollment providers default to auto-renewal opt-in during the initial enrollment process.
notes: TSA PreCheck costs $78 for new enrollment or $70 for online renewal, covering a 5-year period -- it is not an annual subscription. Most people searching for 'cancel TSA PreCheck' have received a renewal notice or discovered an unexpected auto-renewal charge from their enrollment provider. The TSA itself does not handle billing; third-party enrollment providers (primarily IDEMIA) manage registration and payment. Consider Global Entry ($100/5 years) or NEXUS ($50/5 years) as alternatives that include PreCheck benefits plus additional border crossing perks. The REAL ID enforcement deadline has driven increased interest in trusted traveler programs.
